properties.name: coco.audit.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco audit infrastructure is enabled.

properties.name: coco.audit.failure-policy
properties.description: How Coco handles a recorder failure while publishing an audit event.

properties.name: coco.audit.access-log.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco converts access log events to audit events.

values.description: Ignore the failed recorder and continue publishing to remaining recorders.
